query:
UPDATE billing_items bi
JOIN services s1 ON s1.externalId = bi.serviceExternalId
  AND s1.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s1.serviceType = 'Internet'
JOIN services s2 ON s2.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId
  AND s2.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND s2.serviceType = 'Internet'
SET bi.serviceExternalId = s2.externalId, bi.updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sx.externalId) FROM services sx
  WHERE sx.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId
    AND sx.supplierName != 'SasBoss'
    AND sx.serviceType = 'Internet'
) = 1;

UPDATE billing_items bi
JOIN services s1 ON s1.externalId = bi.serviceExternalId
  AND s1.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s1.serviceType = 'Internet'
JOIN services s2 ON s2.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId
  AND s2.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND s2.serviceType = 'Internet'
SET bi.serviceExternalId = s2.externalId, bi.updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sx.externalId) FROM services sx
  WHERE sx.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId
    AND sx.supplierName != 'SasBoss'
    AND sx.serviceType = 'Internet'
) = 1;
